prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第88名，近年排名在86–102名之间波动，整体处于 中上水平；2025年高考周期内中国药科大学出现师德师风负面舆情（教师被指性骚扰学生），评价偏负面；抖音热度排名第90位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光 度不高；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号；药学为A+学科（全国顶尖），中药学相关学科实力突出；招生专业涵盖药学类、中药学类、临床药学、生物制 药等，与王牌学科高度匹配，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学/医药类专业社会热度整体偏热，临床医学、药学等专业持续推荐；河北省2026年考生总数约609 800人，按近年物理类占比约59.8%估算物理类约364660人，较2025年物理类363040人微增约0.45%，竞争略有加剧；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，属长三角地区，对河北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在河北招生占比约3%左右，非主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势 、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+2人）、本省物理类考生微增、学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年24833名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约25218名 ，区间24718–25718名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 14703 → 17032 → 17507 → 17561 → 24833 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings were basically stable in the range of 14700–17600, but in 2025 there was a significant backward shift to 24833, a single-year backward shift of about 7272 places, with notable fluctuation amplitude; the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 81 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 89 in 2024, and 89 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 91, an increase of 2 (+2.25%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion, which slightly eases competition pressure but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked about 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 86–102 in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, China Pharmaceutical University experienced negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics (a teacher was accused of sexually harassing students), with a rather negative evaluation; Douyin popularity ranking is 90th, with an average evaluation, and short video platform exposure is not high; no signal of a cutoff drop was found in historical abnormal admission records; Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and related disciplines in Chinese Materia Medica are outstanding; enrollment majors include Pharmacy, Chinese Materia Medica, Clinical Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals, etc., highly matching the flagship disciplines, which strongly attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of pharmacy/medical majors is generally high, with clinical medicine, pharmacy, and other majors continuously recommended; the total number of candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 609,800, and based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 59.8%, the estimated Physics Category candidates are about 364,660, a slight increase of about 0.45% compared to 363,040 in 2025, with slightly intensified competition; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in the Yangtze River Delta region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 3%, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+2), the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in the province, and the rather negative reputation of the school, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 24833; the predicted minimum ranking is about 25218, with a range of 24718–25718.

- Clinical Pharmacy.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Biotechnology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 25218, with a range of 24718–25718. If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals); for Tier 1 flagship majors (Outstanding Pharmacist Experimental Class, Top Innovation Class), the ranking needs to be significantly better than the lower limit of the range to be a viable option; Tier 3 majors (Chinese Materia Medica, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering) can be used as safety choices. The A+ discipline of Pharmacy is outstanding, so it is recommended to prioritize pharmacy-related majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 2907 → 3426 → 3451 → 3619 → 3836, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 929 positions over 5 years, averaging about 186 positions per year; the baseline for 2025 is about 3836; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 14 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 16, an increase of 3 (+23.1%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which significantly alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 88th, with recent rankings stable in the 86–102 range; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, there was negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics, with a somewhat negative evaluation; Douyin popularity is average (ranked 90th); no signs of score gaps in historical admission anomaly records; Pharmacy is rated A+, top in the country, but the History Category majors are English (Pharmaceutical Direction) and Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction), which have low correlation with the core pharmacy discipline, limiting the appeal of advantageous disciplines to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the English major is generally lukewarm, while the Economic Management category shows differentiation and is also lukewarm; in 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province is about 245,140, a slight increase of about 0.59% from 243,714 in 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Hebei History Category candidates, but the overall attractiveness of pharmaceutical universities to History Category candidates is lower than to Physics Category candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in History Category rankings, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+23%), the slight increase in local History Category candidates, and the negative reputation of the school, the lowering effect of expansion on rankings is partially offset by the increase in candidates and reputation impact; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4397, with a range of 3897–4897.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only offers two majors: English (Pharmaceutical Direction) and Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction). Historical admission rankings are close, with little difference in tiers. The predicted ranking is about 4397, with a range of 3897–4897. Candidates within the range can apply. Both majors are combined with the pharmaceutical industry, with clear employment directions.
